title: wolfhsm-src crate
description: Add wolfhsm-src workspace crate that compiles the wolfHSM C source tree into a static library, mirroring the wolfssl-src pattern. Must locate source via WOLFHSM_SRC env var or ~/GIT/wolfHSM fallback, accept WOLFSSL_INCLUDE_DIR and WOLFSSL_SETTINGS_INCLUDE env vars, compile all 20 src/ files and 7 port/posix/ files unconditionally, and export DEP_WOLFHSM_SRC_INCLUDE and DEP_WOLFHSM_SRC_LIB metadata for wolfhsm-sys.
